narrative:
Madison Twp township has 1,546 registered voters, with 45.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.3 percentage points.
